title: NoSignHitBox
description: Reduces hitboxes of standing signs for smoother gameplay.
body:
⚔️ Gameplay benefits

With NoSignHitBox enabled, you can:

⚔️ Fight near standing signs without your attacks being blocked

🧿 Throw Ender Pearls past standing signs

🍖 Eat food and use items without accidentally targeting a sign

🧱 Break blocks located behind standing signs

📦 Open chests, doors, and containers placed behind standing signs

🏃 Move and interact more freely in tight or sign-heavy areas

This is especially useful on:

PvP servers

KitPvP arenas

Parkour maps

Technical builds and farms

Servers that use standing signs for decoration or mechanics

🧠 How it works

Only modifies standing sign hitboxes

Wall-mounted signs remain unchanged

Client-side only — safe to use on servers

Visual outline of standing signs is reduced

⌨️ Toggle & keybinds

The mod can be toggled on or off at any time

Default keybind: H

The keybind is fully configurable in the Controls menu

You can change or unbind it like any other keybinding



🧩 Compatibility

Minecraft: 1.21.3 - 1.21.8

Loader: Fabric ( Fabric API is required. Download it [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). )
